# Super Greedy

> Automated futures trading software for ES, NQ, MES, and MNQ.

## Canonical Website
- https://supergreedy.com/

## Product
- Name: Super Greedy
- Category: SoftwareApplication
- Description: Super Greedy helps futures traders automate execution during market hours using configurable sessions, bias controls, detection modes, and risk settings.
- Operating Systems: macOS, Windows

## Key Topics
- Automated futures trading
- ES, NQ, MES, and MNQ futures
- Practice, combine, and funded trading workflows
- TopstepX and prop firm-compatible risk controls

## Primary Content URLs
- https://supergreedy.com/
- https://supergreedy.com/sitemap.xml

## Contact
- Email: hello@supergreedy.com

## Crawling
- AI and search crawlers are allowed according to robots.txt.
